About.description: At Oson Uy, we believe that buying a home should be as seamless as ordering a taxi. Our mission is to bring transparency, data-driven decisions, and trust to the primary housing market of Uzbekistan.
About.quote: Founded by a team of real estate veterans and tech entrepreneurs in Tashkent, 2024.
About.secureText: Every developer on our platform undergoes a rigorous 30-point verification audit, ensuring your investments are safe and delivery dates are realistic.

Footer.description: The most trusted primary real estate platform in Uzbekistan. Connecting you with premium living spaces.
Footer.copyright: © 2024 Oson Uy Real Estate. Primary Market Specialist.

LeadModal.title: Get In Touch
LeadModal.defaultDescription: Leave your details and our dedicated consultants will contact you within 15 minutes.

ProjectDetails.videoReviewText: Check out a short video overview of this residential complex. In this video, you can see the architecture of the project, layouts, and surrounding infrastructure in dynamics. We have prepared this format specifically so that you can feel the atmosphere of your future home right from your smartphone.
ProjectDetails.exclusiveFootage: Exclusive footage from the construction site
ProjectDetails.floorNotPublished: Floor plans and pricing are not published for this project yet.

FloorTower.title: Scale-model block
FloorTower.description: A static 3D facade: brick, beige accents, lit windows, plinth, entrance canopies, and lawn patches. Fixed camera—no orbit.
FloorTower.hint: Click a floor on the model or use the chips below.
FloorTower.placeholderMore: About {count} more storeys are empty in the developer dashboard for this project.
FloorTower.empty: Floors are not published yet. Check back later or leave a general inquiry.
